cms.task_text: Bloky pro písmeno L jsou [hlp]rozhozeny[/hlp]. Sestavte je správně: svislý tah, otočení, vodorovný tah.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="20" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block><block type="turtle_left" x="190" y="20"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="360" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
